description: Style Note This impeccably designed shirt from indigo nation remains a timeless classic. Wear this with chinos or denims and style it with understated accessories. Product Details Black shirt made of 100% cotton, has a spread collar, short sleeves, full buttoned placket, a patch pocket on the left chest with button closure and a curved hem Material and Care 100% cotton Wash dark colours separately Hand wash or machine wash cold Use mild detergent Flat dry in shade Do not wring, bleach, iron on print Size and Fit Edgy fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size 42
